selection_caveat: moderate residual replay bias: excluding T19 lowers replay collision rate to ~8.4% vs 11.0% full

rt10_fix.decision: run_level_claims_allowed=false is a scope boundary, not a terminal final-status leaf, when matched_scenario_feasible=true and frozen exclusions are supported.

8.summary: Corrected universe uses full_300 outcome cells and clean_285 replay cells; T19 is the single replay-only exclusion; residual replay bias is moderate.

9.summary: Final status recomputed as READY_WITH_FROZEN_EXCLUSIONS with run-level and repeated-run limitations recorded as scope boundaries.

10.summary: RT10 identified the imported decision-tree precedence defect; RT03, RT04, and RT06 remain documented nonblocking caveats.

11.summary: Decision-tree precedence amended without adding or renaming leaves; final readiness leaf recomputed on the corrected full_300 outcome / clean_285 replay universe.
